title: Deserts Of Rajasthan With Bikaner
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Visit the World’s Largest Desert Living Fort - Jaisalmer Fort, and listen to the folk tales by the locals residing in the fort Sit on the edge of the walls of the Nahargarh Fort and admire the pink city with the sunset overlooking you Visit one of the most preserved and largest forts of India, Mehrangarh Fort, Jodhpur and take pictures of the vibrant blue city from the top Admire the beauty of Amer Fort by visiting the most authentic Sheesh Mahal where the legendary song ‘Pyaar kiya toh darna kya’ was shot Dance on the Rajasthani beats in the local attire with the local Cultural Folk Dancers while having sizzling barbeque in the vivid desert.

itinerary.title: Day 7 - Jodhpur to Jaipur and Departure

inclusions: Accommodation in Hotel as per the variant selected
Breakfast and Dinner as mentioned in the variant
All toll tax, parking, fuel and driver allowances
Comfortable and hygienic vehicle (AC Sedan/SUV/Traveler) for sightseeing on all days as per the itinerary

faqs.question: What is the best time for Rajasthan?
faqs.answer: For pleasant weather, visit between March and June.

faqs.question: Are meals included?
faqs.answer: Breakfast and dinner are typically included in most packages.

faqs.question: Is it safe for solo travelers?
faqs.answer: Yes, our guides ensure a very safe environment for everyone.

reviews.text: Discover unforgettable experiences with India Travel Holiday. Whether it’s the snow-covered hills of Himachal or the vibrant streets of Rajasthan, we offer the most memorable journeys across India.

reviews.text: Rajasthan’s royal palaces, majestic forts, and rich cultural heritage await you. Journey through this enchanting land and experience India’s heritage like never before.
